description: CompositionPurple round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, and print on the chest with sequin detailingFittingRegularWash careLight machine washDo not scrub, bleach or dry cleanDry flat/ reverseWarm iron on reverse Pamper your ultra femme attitude with this purple T-shirt from inkfruit. The sequin detailing adds a subtle touch of style, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day long. Pair it with a skirt or denims for a great feminine look.
